# Vue 3 + Vite Project Setup

## Project Setup Checklist

- [x] Created copilot-instructions.md file
- [x] Scaffold the project with `npm create vite . -- --template vue`
- [x] Install dependencies - completed automatically
- [x] Verify build configuration
- [x] Documentation updated (README.md)

## Project Information

This is a Vue 3 project scaffolded with Vite, a next generation frontend build tool.

**Technology Stack:**
- Vue 3
- Vite 8.0.7
- JavaScript/HTML/CSS

**Development Commands:**
- `npm run dev` - Start development server (http://localhost:5173/)
- `npm run build` - Build for production
- `npm run preview` - Preview production build locally

**Project Created:**
- Date: April 8, 2026
- Package Name: desruelle
- Location: c:\Users\user\Documents\Cours\L3\Framework\Desruelle

## Next Steps

1. Run `npm run dev` to start the development server
2. Edit `src/App.vue` to start developing
3. Create new components in `src/components/`
4. Build for production when ready with `npm run build`
